  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pamattu leek / tad lai tas tam
mafsa winna pirmu Dehlu / un
tad winſch tahs Wahrtis eezelt/
lai tas tam maſfa winna masaku
Dehlu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta bijn tas KUNGS ar
Josuu/un winna Slawa ispande
zaur wiſſu to Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta VII. Nodalla.
Afans nemim no tahm iſdeldeitwahm Leetahm: 1.
Pahr to apſtaifahs Deews un leek tohs Isra-
eia Behrnuß no teem Ajas Wihrreem faut: 2.
Josuiis pecluhds to KUNGU: 6. Tas at-
bild / ka tee Laudis pee tahm iſdeldeitizahm
Leetahin noseegufchees: 10. Afans tohp nosee-
dsigß atrasts: 16/18. Un ar Akmiæcem no-
mehtahtß: 25.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Et tee Israëka Behrni
noseedsahs pee ta / kas
Isdeldeitins / jo Afans/
Karmus Dehls / ta Dehla Sab-
dus/ ta Dehla Serus/ no Juwda
Zilts nehme no ta/kas Isdeldeitins
bija/ tad apſkaitahs ta KUNGA
Bahrsiba prett Israëka Behr-
neem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Josuiis Wihrus is-
fuhtija no Jerikus us Aju / kas
pee Bet-Awenas gull / Betelam
prettRihteen/tad runnaja wiſsch
us teem / fazzidams : Eite aug-
ſcham/ un iſluhkoject to Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje tee Wihrius ang-
ſchu/ un iſluhkoja Aju/ un tad at-
greesahs tee pee Josuiis/ un fazzi-
ja us to : Laid wiſſi Laudis ne no-
eet/ bet laid kahdi diwituhſtoſchi/
jeb trihstuhtſtoſchi Wihrino.eet/
un Aju iſkanj / ne veekaufe turp
wiſſus Laudis / jo winnu / (Pas
Vilsfapta)/ irr mas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs no teem La-
dim us turren trihstuhtſto-
Wihti / bet teem bij preekſch te-
Wihtreem no Ajasjabehg.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Wihti no Ajas fa-
no teem trihsdefinitis un feſch W-
rus/ un dfinnahs teem pakkat-
tahm Wahrtim lihds Savarti-
un kawe tohs us to Zettu/ fas
Leiju eet / tad iſkuffe to Lausa-
Sirde/ un kna itt ka Uhdens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faplohtija Josuiis
was Drehees/ un mettehs us
wu Waign pee Semines pree-
ta KUNGA Schkirsta/lihds p-
Wakkaran / wiſch un Isra-
Wezzajee/ un tee likke Pihſch-
us farwahin Galwahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuiis fazzija :
Kungs/KUNGS! kapehz eff-
lizzis tchohs Landis eet zaar J-
dann / dehdams muhs eekſch-
Amoriteru Rohkas / muhs isi-
deht? Ak! kaut mehs buhtum/
ta mehs bijam fahtufchi / wi-
pufs Jardanas palikkuſcht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak Kungs! ko es fazzifch-
pehz to / ka Israëls jaweem
naidneekeem to Muguru atgree-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee Kananiteri/ un n-
fi Semmes Eedſthwotaji to D-
dehe / tad apſtahs tee apka-
muns / un iſdeldehs mu-
Wahrduno Semmes / ko tad-
darriti pee tawa leela Wahrd-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas KUNG-
us Josuii: Zellees augſcham/
pehz gulli tu ta us tawu Wai-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Israëls irr apgrehtoje-
un irr arridsan mannu Der-
"
    }
  ],
